description: Historical crime coin pattern database. Compiled from confirmed crime pump case studies.

pre_pump_signals.supply_concentration: Over 90% supply held by coordinated wallets
pre_pump_signals.funding_rate: Pushed to -2% per 4h period during operation
pre_pump_signals.stage_three_trap: OI dropped with volume spike and temporary price dip, shorts entered, price then reversed sharply trapping all new shorts
pre_pump_signals.exchange_concentration: Primary operations on exchanges with weak risk controls

RAVE.key_pattern: The $RAVE model is the reference case for Stage Three trap detection. Market makers closed shorts and unwound hedges to create a drop in OI with a price drop and increased volume. This made the move appear exhausted. Short sellers entered. Price then reversed and continued higher.

pre_pump_signals.coordination: Coordinated buy transactions from newly funded wallets

pre_pump_signals.oi_to_mcap_ratio: Very high OI relative to market cap
pre_pump_signals.funding_rate: Deeply negative funding before major moves

pre_pump_signals.exchange_distribution: Low exchange balances making spot easy to move
pre_pump_signals.price_suppression: Extended flat period before vertical move

pre_pump_signals.market_maker_coordination: Active market maker with profit sharing agreement
pre_pump_signals.weak_exchange_operations: Primary operations on Bitget and Gate

pre_pump_signals.market_maker_coordination: Active market maker with token lending agreement
pre_pump_signals.cold_wallet_withdrawals: Large withdrawals from exchange cold wallets
pre_pump_signals.distribution_phase: Clear Stage Four distribution with funding at -2%

MYX.key_pattern: MYX demonstrated clear four-stage lifecycle progression with active market maker involvement. Cold wallet withdrawal detection would have flagged the preparation phase.

pre_pump_signals.weak_exchange_operations: Primary operations on exchanges with weak risk controls
pre_pump_signals.coordinated_social: Coordinated social media campaign preceding pump

pre_pump_signals.funding_extraction: Negative funding used as profit extraction mechanism

common_patterns_ranked.signal: Supply concentration above 90% in coordinated wallets
Operations concentrated on exchanges with weak risk controls (Bitget, Gate, Aster)
Deeply negative funding rate (-1.5% to -2% per 4h period)
Stage Three trap pattern (OI drop + volume spike + price dip + reversal)
Cold wallet withdrawals from exchanges before pump
Coordinated social media push with new/reactivated accounts
Active market maker with token lending or profit sharing agreement
Exchange deposit/withdrawal suspensions isolating the market

detection_model_rules.highest_confidence_combo: 2+ layers triggered AND trap bot T2 Stop Sweep detected
